channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fourth-down decision late in second quarter allows John Harbaugh to remain unbeaten vs. his brother
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Coaches normally don't go for it on fourth-and-1 on their own 16-yard line when they're trailing 10-7 with 2 minutes to go in the first half.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rams WR Demarcus Robinson arrested on suspicion of DUI after loss to Eagles
item.description: Los Angeles Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cracks beginning to show as Warriors blow another big lead in loss to Nets
item.description: The Warriors blew a 17-point lead in San Antonio and then an 18-point advantage Monday night to the Nets.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Whittingham uncertain about future at Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This has been the most disappointing and most frustrating season in Kyle Whittingham's 20 years as head coach of the Utah football team. But will Whittingham be back for a 21st season? He has a decision to make in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former NHL player Paul Bissonnette attacked during altercation at Scottsdale steakhouse
item.description: Former NHL player and TNT hockey analyst Paul Bissonnette was assaulted by several men during an altercation at a Scottsdale steakhouse on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tiger Woods to skip his holiday tournament in the Bahamas as his back heals
item.description: Tiger Woods won't be playing in the Bahamas next week at the Hero World Challenge as he recovers from a sixth back surgery he had in September.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Judge rejects request to sideline a San Jose State volleyball player on grounds she’s transgender
item.description: A judge on Monday rejected a request to block a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member from playing in a conference tournament on grounds that she is transgender. The ruling by U.S. Magistrate Judge S.
item.dc:creator: MEAD GRUVER and AMY BETH HANSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Memphis beats No. 2 UConn 99-97 in overtime to tip off Maui Invitational
item.description: LAHAINA, Hawaii (AP) — Tyrese Hunter scored 17 of his 26 points after halftime to lead Memphis to a 99-97 overtime win against two-time defending national champion and second-ranked UConn on Monday in the first round of the Maui Invitational.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Family mourns death of 27-year-old woman in Harvey train crash
item.description: A 27-year-old woman was killed in a car versus train crash in Harvey, IL, leaving behind a family grieving for her loss.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Medina, WGN 9

item.title: Wake up the ghosts! Texas, Texas A&M rivalry that dates to 1894 is reborn
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Any Texas or Texas A&M player has heard the lore of the rivalry between the two schools, a grudge match that dates to 1894.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: United Football League launches expansion process in hopes of growing from 8 teams
item.description: The United Football League announced on Monday it is looking to expand and has launched the process for it in hopes of growing from eight teams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Saquon Barkley sets Eagles franchise record with 255 yards rushing, 2 TDs in a 37-20 win over Rams
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — When Saquon Barkley glanced up at a SoFi Stadium replay of his latest huge run for the Philadelphia Eagles on Sunday night, he happened to see a graphic indicating he had 173 yards rushing — only 16 shy of what he knew to be his career high.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennessee mayor Glenn Jacobs, ex-WWE star, says he would advise Dwayne Johnson against going into politics
item.description: Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson has teased going into politics for years. But Glenn Jacobs, a Tennessee mayor and former WWE star, advised him not to do it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: St. Louis Blues fire Drew Bannister and hire Jim Montgomery as coach
item.description: Drew Bannister is out as coach of the St. Louis Blues after less than a full calendar year on the job. Jim Montgomery is back behind the bench of an NHL team five days after he was fired by the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jets look for coach, GM amid chaos
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – With the Jets’ season completely off the rails, it wasn't a big surprise when General Manager Joe Douglas was fired this week. Changes need to be made, and Douglas was carrying around a 30-64 record over five-plus seasons.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: BYU comeback falls short at ASU, 28-23
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU's offense took too late to get going, and the Cougars' chances at a Big 12 Championship took a serious hit with a 28-23 loss at Arizona State Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU sweeps men's and women's cross-country national titles
item.description: WACO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU became just the fifth school ever to win national titles in both men's and women's cross-country. The #1 ranked women's team won its sixth in program history, with a team score of 147 at the Zimmer Championship Course Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Purdy, Bosa out for Green Bay matchup, Allen steps up as QB
item.description: (KRON) – San Francisco 49ers head coach Kyle Shanahan announced in a press conference Friday that quarterback Brock Purdy will be out for Sunday’s game against the Green Bay Packers. Purdy injured his right shoulder in last Sunday's loss to the Seattle Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Jazz blow 20-point lead to Spurs, lose fourth straight
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (AP) - Harrison Barnes had 25 points and 10 rebounds, rookie Stephon Castle scored 18 points and the San Antonio Spurs rallied to defeat the Utah Jazz 126-118 on Thursday night for their second straight win without Victor Wembanyama.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ticket renewals begin for 2025 Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg
item.description: Fans who purchased 3-Day grandstand tickets in 2024 can now renew their tickets for the Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC
